title: DISTINCT malfunctions for IS NULL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default', c2 REAL, PRIMARY KEY (c0, c1));
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c0 IS NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT DISTINCT with NULL IS condition fails to fetch rows
